_comment_language: Works with any language -- extensions below are just an example (C# backend, TS frontend). Auto-detect (when this file doesn't exist yet) only recognizes package.json/.ts.tsx.js.jsx, *.csproj/.cs, pyproject.toml/.py, go.mod/.go, pom.xml/.java. Any other language (Rust, Ruby, PHP, etc.) -- just edit 'extensions' below by hand, the scanner doesn't care what you put there. Note: actual pack building still depends on Graphify supporting that language for extraction.
_comment_roots: Top-level folders to scan. 'name' = label for reports. 'path' = real folder path, relative to repo root. 'extensions' = which file types count as real code there.
_comment_excluded_modules: graphify-out/<module> names to fully skip -- deprecated/legacy areas you never want touched.
